title: Local de armazenamento dos defensivos agrícolas Schema
description: JSON Schema for Local de armazenamento dos defensivos agrícolas ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions using IRI format.
narrative: This schema validates IRI-formatted codes for the Local de armazenamento dos defensivos agrícolas ValueSet. Each enum value includes the system URI in the format {systemuri}#{code} to match JSON-LD enumeration IRIs. Display values are available at https://jefersonrl.github.io/AgroSUS-FHIR/ValueSet-agrosus-local-armazenamento-defensivos.displays.json. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
